Short Description: LSL application that connects compatible Tobii Pro devices to the Lab Streaming Layer ecosystem.
Dependencies / Ecosystem: Lab Streaming Layer; Tobii Pro SDK
Notes: Repository is the canonical LSL app for Tobii Pro devices.

Short Description: Open-source workflow for combining eye-tracking and audio data to study gaze and speech synchrony in triadic interactions.
Notes: Focus on social interaction and synchrony analysis

Short Description: MATLAB GUI for processing and analyzing pupillometry data with standardized preprocessing and group analysis workflows.
Notes: Readme link points to the project page; source code is mirrored on GitHub.

Short Description: Toolbox for synchronizing and analyzing combined EEG and eye-tracking data.
Notes: Extends EEGLAB

Short Description: Python package for extracting engineered and optional deep features from eye-tracking data for downstream modeling.
Notes: Main repository is notebook-heavy but installable as a Python package.

Short Description: Browser-based open-source plugin for real-time reading and eye movement metrics from streamed gaze data on web pages.
Dependencies / Ecosystem: Browser extension; WebSocket; optional Python bridge
Notes: Readme links to the source repository on GESIS GitLab.

Short Description: Software for collecting, reviewing, and exporting data from Tobii Pro Glasses 3 recordings.
Notes: Focused on Glasses 3 workflows and packaged application releases

Short Description: R package providing tools for processing, analyzing, and visualizing eye-tracking data.
Notes: Includes functions for HDF5 events, interpolation, AOI growth plots, and heatmaps

Short Description: Script for plotting floating bar graphs from Tobii Pro Lab exported data.
Notes: Simple visualization utility

Short Description: Tool for manual mapping of gaze data to objects of interest.
Dependencies / Ecosystem: Tobii Pro Glasses 2; Tobii Pro Glasses 3
Notes: Often used with GlassesViewer.

Short Description: Open-source tool for automated world-based mapping and processing of wearable eye tracker data.
Notes: Can map gaze to planar surfaces and synchronize recordings across participants.

Short Description: R package for reading, binning, AOI coding, and analyzing gaze-position and pupil-size time-course data.
Notes: Handles gaze-position and pupillometric data in the same workflow.

Short Description: Python toolkit for importing and processing wearable eye tracker recordings in a shared intermediate format.
Notes: Used as the backend for gazeMapper and glassesValidator.

Short Description: Tool for estimating accuracy and precision in wearable eye tracker recordings.
Notes: Recent versions rely on glassesTools for much of the backend processing.

Short Description: Open-source Matlab utility for viewing and analyzing data from Tobii Pro Glasses 2 and 3. It integrates with GazeCode tool for manual mapping.
Notes: Supports Tobii Glasses 2 and 3 recording folders from SD-card exports.

Short Description: Simple Hello World script that gets gaze data from a Tobii Pro eye tracker and prints it to the console.
Notes: Requires Python 3.10 and the tobii_research package.

Short Description: Community eye-tracking infrastructure built right into development environments for software engineers and education researchers to conduct realistic eye tracking studies.
Dependencies / Ecosystem: Eclipse; Visual Studio; Atom; Chrome; JetBrains; Sublime; Notepad++
Notes: Support is available for Eclipse, Visual Studio, Atom, and Chrome.

Short Description: R package for event classification, AOI-based analyses, and publication-oriented visualizations of eye-tracking data.
Notes: CRAN package with multiple fixation classification algorithms.

Short Description: Widely used framework for time-synchronized multimodal data streaming across experimental systems.
Notes: Generic framework rather than a Tobii-specific connector.

Short Description: Toolset for managing multi-station behavioral research labs and launching coordinated experiment tasks.
Dependencies / Ecosystem: Python; network discovery; optional eye-tracker extras
Notes: The eye-tracker client can report Tobii device status inside managed lab setups.

Short Description: App that makes Glasses 3 compatible with Lab Streaming Layer. It automatically locates Glasses 3 eye trackers and exposes eye tracking data streams in LSL.
Notes: Designed for wearable workflows

Short Description: Python package that maps mobile gaze coordinates from scene video onto a fixed target stimulus.
Notes: Designed for wearable recordings where gaze must be remapped to a planar target.

Short Description: MATLAB implementation of the Nystr�m and Holmqvist adaptive event classification algorithm with extensions.
Notes: Implements the Nyström and Holmqvist 2010 method plus later extensions.

Short Description: Graphical experiment builder for behavioral sciences with eye-tracking support.
Notes: Supports multiple backends including PsychoPy.

Short Description: MATLAB framework for behavioral experiments and stimulus presentation with Tobii support via Titta.
Notes: Supports finite-state-machine task logic and complex stimulus control.

Short Description: Python implementation of the EyeMMV spatial-dispersion fixation detection algorithm with basic visualization support.
Notes: Implements the two-step I-DT style algorithm used in EyeMMV.

Short Description: Easy-to-use and fully graphical application for visualizing, segmenting and analyzing physiological data, including eye tracking data recorded with E-Prime extensions for Tobii.
Notes: Supports E-Prime extensions for Tobii.

Short Description: Extension enabling direct connection between Tobii Pro eye trackers and Presentation software by Neurobehavioral Systems.
Notes: Requires Presentation software by Neurobehavioral Systems

Short Description: Open-source platform for creating and running a wide range of behavioral experiments.
Notes: Widely used in psychology and neuroscience

Short Description: Toolbox for vision research and experiment control in MATLAB
Notes: Often used with Tobii SDK integrations

Short Description: Python package for preprocessing pupil data and interactively visualizing pupil size and fixation information.
Notes: Repository emphasizes preprocessing and exploratory plots rather than device control.

Short Description: Python implementation of IPA and LHIPA algorithms for estimating cognitive load from pupil data.
Notes: Implements established pupillometry metrics

Short Description: R package for cleaning, analyzing, and visualizing pupillometry experiments in a single pipeline.
Notes: Also available via CRAN mirror.

Short Description: GUI-oriented software for preprocessing pupillometric recordings and extracting robust outcome measures.
Notes: Repository links directly to the associated Scientific Reports article.

Short Description: Cross-platform Python library for building eye-tracking experiments with stimulus presentation and online gaze interaction.
Notes: Supports multiple eye trackers, including Tobii integrations.

Short Description: Python package for downloading datasets, preprocessing gaze data, detecting events, and visualizing results.
Notes: Active open-source package with dataset loaders and plotting support.

Short Description: Python library for pupillometry and eye-tracking analysis with reusable processing and modeling components.
Notes: Repository is focused on programmatic workflows rather than a GUI.

Short Description: Python toolkit for extracting eye movement features and organizing analyses from raw eye-tracking datasets.
Notes: Includes data readers, experiment abstractions, and subject-level analysis utilities.

Short Description: MATLAB implementation of the SaFiDe method for detecting saccade and fixation periods from eye movement signals.
Notes: Repository is lightweight and centered on the core algorithm files.

Short Description: R package for computing scanpath similarity measures such as MultiMatch from eye-tracking sequences.
Notes: Repository focuses on scanpath comparison workflows.

Short Description: Component inside Titta that lets external MATLAB experiments communicate with Tobii Pro Lab recording workflows.
Notes: Entry refers to the TalkToProLab component inside the Titta repository.
Latest change: Changed category from Integration & Synchronization to Experiment Design & Data Collection

Short Description: Python toolbox for running Tobii screen-based experiments with PsychoPy-based participant setup, calibration, and recording.
Notes: For Python workflows; includes demo analyses and experiment examples.

Short Description: MATLAB toolbox for running Tobii screen-based experiments with Psychtoolbox-based participant setup, calibration, and recording.
Notes: Repository also contains TalkToProLab and LSL-related components.

Short Description: LSL extension for streaming Tobii gaze data with low-latency timing for networked and multi-participant experiments.
Dependencies / Ecosystem: Lab Streaming Layer; Titta; Tobii Pro SDK
Notes: Entry refers to the LSL_streamer component inside the Titta repository.
Latest change: Keep it under the right category in the Readme file

Short Description: SDK for .net development that includes methods for managing Glasses 3 such as calibrate, record and replay eye tracking data.
Notes: Supports live control and post-session access via standard protocols.

Short Description: Official Tobii developer SDK family for discovering compatible devices, controlling sessions, and streaming gaze data.
Notes: Readme links to the official developer portal rather than a single source repository.
Latest change: Changed device category to screen-based only

Short Description: Reproducible pipeline for cleaning Tobii data, analyzing sequence patterns and clusters, and running predictive models.
Notes: Repository combines statistical scripts and machine-learning workflows.

Short Description: Python controller for accessing Tobii Pro Glasses 2 eye-tracking data and managing recordings, participants and calibrations.
Notes: Lower-level controller focused on direct device interaction and recording management.

Short Description: Python toolkit for controlling Tobii Pro Glasses 2 and managing study recording workflows.
Notes: Package focuses on Glasses 2 control and cross-platform scripting.

Short Description: Lightweight Python bridge that publishes Tobii Pro SDK gaze data into Lab Streaming Layer streams.
Notes: Uses timestamps provided by the Tobii API for stream timing.

Short Description: Modular real-time pipeline for collecting and processing eye and head tracking data from Tobii Pro Glasses 3.
Notes: Repository accompanies the TP3Py preprint.

Short Description: Script for generating transition matrix visualizations from Tobii Pro Lab exports.
Notes: Designed for post-processing exported data

Short Description: Program for recording and analyzing writing and translation processes
Notes: Used in translation process research
